faqs.question: What's included in the Free tier?
faqs.answer: The Free tier gives you access to all free-tier MCP tools (a subset of the full 74-tool catalog), 50 credits per day, community support, and the ability to bring your own API keys (BYOK). No credit card required, and the free tier never expires.

faqs.question: What's included in the Pro plan ($29/mo)?
faqs.answer: Pro includes 500 credits per day, access to all 74 MCP tools including premium-tier image studio tools, priority support with a 48-hour response SLA, a usage analytics dashboard, and both BYOK and spike.land proxy credit support. Credits roll over monthly up to a 2× cap.

faqs.question: What's included in the Business plan ($99/mo)?
faqs.answer: Business includes unlimited credits with no daily cap, all 74 tools, team management and shared API key pools, custom tool deployment, 24-hour SLA-backed support, audit logs and usage reporting, and early access to marketplace features. Business plans can also be invoiced annually.

faqs.question: How do credits work?
faqs.answer: Credits are the billing unit for tool calls that use AI models internally (image analysis, code explanation, content generation, etc.). Most basic tool calls (chess moves, browser automation, file operations) cost 0 credits. Model-backed calls typically cost 1–3 credits depending on the model and token count. Free tier: 50 credits/day. Pro: 500 credits/day with monthly rollover. Business: unlimited. You can also purchase additional credits at $0.10 each.

faqs.question: Do credits expire?
faqs.answer: Daily credits reset at midnight UTC. Unused credits roll over monthly on Pro and Business plans, up to a 2× cap (i.e., up to 1,000 banked credits on Pro). Purchased proxy credits do not expire and carry over indefinitely.

faqs.question: Can I bring my own API keys (BYOK)?
faqs.answer: Yes. You can add API keys for OpenAI, Anthropic, and Replicate in your dashboard under API Keys. When BYOK is active, tool calls route through your keys directly — you pay the provider at their published rates, and spike.land does not see or mark up your model costs. BYOK is available on all plans including the free tier.

faqs.question: Should I use BYOK or spike.land proxy credits?
faqs.answer: BYOK gives you full control over your model spend — use your existing provider accounts, rate limits, and credits. Proxy credits are better if you want consolidated billing (one line item instead of multiple provider invoices) or if you do not have existing provider accounts. Both options are available on all paid plans. The free tier supports BYOK only.

faqs.question: What's the marketplace revenue share?
faqs.answer: Tool authors keep 70% of revenue generated by their tools. spike.land retains 30% to cover infrastructure, billing, auth, discovery, and protocol compliance. Payouts are processed monthly for balances above $10. Revenue is calculated per successful tool execution billed to a user.

faqs.question: How do I publish a tool to the marketplace?
faqs.answer: You need a spike.land developer account, a valid MCP tool definition (name, description, Zod input schema, and a handler), and either a published npm package or a deployed Cloudflare Worker endpoint. Apply for early marketplace access at spike.land/marketplace/apply. We review submissions for protocol compliance and response quality before listing.

faqs.question: Is there an annual pricing discount?
faqs.answer: Yes. Both Pro and Business plans are available at a 20% discount with annual billing. Pro annual is $278/year ($23.17/month effective, vs $29/month monthly). Business annual is $950/year ($79.17/month effective, vs $99/month monthly). Annual plans are billed upfront and non-refundable after the first 14 days.

faqs.question: What is the refund policy?
faqs.answer: Monthly plans can be cancelled at any time. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period — no prorated refunds for partial months. Annual plans include a 14-day full refund window from the date of purchase. After 14 days, annual plans are non-refundable. Purchased proxy credits are non-refundable.

faqs.question: What team features are available on Business?
faqs.answer: Business plans include: inviting team members with role-based access (admin, developer, viewer), shared API key pools so the team uses one set of credentials, tool access controls by member, centralized usage reporting and audit logs, and the ability to deploy private custom tools visible only to your team.

faqs.question: What is MCP and why does spike.land use it?
faqs.answer: MCP (Model Context Protocol) is an open standard that defines how AI clients discover, connect to, and call external tools. Instead of custom integrations for every tool, MCP provides one protocol — implemented once on each side — that any AI client can use to talk to any MCP server. spike.land exposes all 74 tools over MCP so your AI agent gets them all through a single connection. Read more: spike.land/blog/mcp-explained-universal-adapter-for-ai-tools

faqs.question: How do I connect my AI agent to spike.land?
faqs.answer: The fastest way is spike-cli: run `npx @spike-land-ai/spike-cli shell` and you are connected immediately. For Claude Code and other MCP clients, add the spike.land endpoint to your .mcp.json config with your API access token from Dashboard > API Keys. For custom agents using the Anthropic SDK or OpenAI Assistants, call the HTTP endpoint at https://spike.land/api/mcp directly.

faqs.question: Does the free tier expire?
faqs.answer: No. The free tier has no time limit. You can use spike.land's free-tier tools with 50 credits per day indefinitely. There is no trial period, no expiration date, and no automatic conversion to a paid plan.
